_doc: Trigger surface for the lexical role-routing eval (role-routing.test.ts). Positives must route to their labeled role with margin >= 1; negatives must have no strong winner. Keep prompts phrased the way the MAIN MODEL would phrase a delegation, since the role description is matched against that phrasing.

explorer: where is the retry ladder defined and how is it used
search the codebase for every usage of steerText and distill what each one does
read through these large files and answer what the compaction flow does
find where the config schema lookup happens
executor: make this one bounded edit: rename the flag in plan-runner
apply the specified single change to the parser file and report exact changed files
do this fully-specified edit off the main window using mode=fork
verifier: try to refute the claim that the fix handles empty input
check the just-made change and return a verdict with evidence
run the tests to verify this claim before the plan accepts it
